pain_problem_clarity.rationale: Specific painful leftover-waste trigger and alternatives.

target_user_sharpness.rationale: Busy solo cooks with excluded use cases.

repeat_use_retention_loop.rationale: Saved preferences, avoided-waste history, and pantry depletion create a repeat-use loop.

money_path_believability.rationale: Paid boundary tied to saved plans and grocery export value.

product_distinctiveness_taste.rationale: Pantry-first planning, calm tone, and leftover-aware interactions.

blueprint_coverage_launch_slice_integrit.rationale: Activation, core loop, retention, and money boundary all mapped.

evidence_integrity.rationale: Claims cite local fixture artifacts and coverage matrix.

notes: App quality scorecard only; pipeline enforcement score is intentionally separate.
